---
title: ""
page-layout: full
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 200px
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ikim124@ucr.edu
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Op0POqIAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/InikKim
---

## Hi, I'm Inik Kim

I am a Ph.D. student in the [Department of Psychology](https://psychology.ucr.edu/) at the **University of California, Riverside**, working in the [Cognitive Neuroscience of Perception, Attention, and Memory Lab](https://memory.ucr.edu/) under the supervision of **Dr. Weiwei Zhang**.

My research broadly focuses on **visual working memory**, **attention**, and **perception**. I am particularly interested in understanding the underlying processes of human cognition and behavior, such as memory using cognitive modeling and advanced data analysis techniques. 

Before joining UCR, I completed my B.A. and M.A. in Psychology at [Jeonbuk National University](https://psy.jbnu.ac.kr/psy/index.do) (South Korea) , where I studied affective neuroscience and psychophysics with Dr. Jongwan Kim and Dr. Chang-Ho Park.

---

## Research Interests

- Visual Working Memory
- Computational Modeling
- Cognitive Neuroscience
- Attention & Perception
- Affective Neuroscience

---

## Education

**Ph.D. in Psychology** *(2023 – present)*
University of California, Riverside, USA
Advisor: Dr. Weiwei Zhang

**M.A. in Psychology** *(2018 – 2020)*
Jeonbuk National University, South Korea
Advisor: Dr. Chang-Ho Park

**B.A. in Psychology** *(2011 – 2017)*
Jeonbuk National University, South Korea
